items.title: Futu Holdings Limited Securities Fraud Class Action Result of Undisclosed Regulatory Compliance Failures and approximately 32% Stock Decline - Investors may Contact Lewis Kahn, Esq, at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC
items.summary: Futu Holdings Limited faces a securities class action lawsuit for failing to disclose material information regarding non-compliance with China Securities Regulatory Commission requirements. The company allegedly conducted securities, public fund sales, and futures business in mainland China without proper licenses or approvals, resulting in a 32% stock decline. Investors who purchased securities between May 24, 2023 and May 27, 2026 have until August 25, 2026 to file lead plaintiff applications.

items.title: רוזן, יועץ מהימן למשקיעים, מעודד את משקיעיFutu Holdings Limited לקבל ייעוץ משפטי לקראת מועד אחרון חשוב במסגרת תביעה ייצוגית בניירות הערך – FUTU
items.summary: Rosen Law Firm reminds investors in Futu Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: FUTU) of the August 25, 2026 deadline to file a securities class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Futu made false statements and failed to disclose that it was operating without required licenses from Chinese regulators (CSRC) for securities, public fund sales, and futures trading in mainland China, potentially facing regulatory sanctions and inflated financial results.

items.title: Futu Holdings Limited Securities Fraud Class Action Result of Undisclosed Regulatory Compliance Failures and approximately 32% Stock Decline - Investors may Contact Lewis Kahn, Esq, at Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC
items.summary: Futu Holdings Limited faces a securities class action lawsuit for failing to disclose material information regarding non-compliance with China Securities Regulatory Commission requirements. The company allegedly conducted securities, public fund sales, and futures business in mainland China without proper licenses or approvals, resulting in a 32% stock decline. Investors who purchased securities between May 24, 2023 and May 27, 2026 have until August 25, 2026 to file lead plaintiff applications.

items.title: Futu Investor News: If You Have Suffered Losses in Futu Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: FUTU), You Are Encouraged to Contact The Rosen Law Firm About Your Rights
items.summary: The Rosen Law Firm announced an investigation into potential securities claims against Futu Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: FUTU) following China's announcement of a crackdown on cross-border securities trading. The regulatory action, announced on May 22, 2026, accused Futu of illegally soliciting business in China without proper licensing, causing Futu's ADSs to plummet 27.5%. The firm is preparing a class action lawsuit to recover investor losses.

items.title: Futu Investor News: If You Have Suffered Losses in Futu Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: FUTU), You Are Encouraged to Contact The Rosen Law Firm About Your Rights
items.summary: The Rosen Law Firm announced an investigation into potential securities claims against Futu Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: FUTU) following China's announcement of a crackdown on cross-border securities brokers. The regulatory action caused Futu's ADSs to plunge 27.5% on May 22, 2026. The firm is preparing a class action lawsuit to recover investor losses from allegedly misleading business information.
